name: KeyCRM Sync
description: Order sync to KeyCRM for OpenCart 4.x — pushes orders on placement / status change, idempotent (no duplicate orders), retry queue via cron, field & payment mapping, encrypted API key, sync journal with request/response log. Auto-creates the KeyCRM source on first order. Reverse sync via cron: order statuses (with admin-configured mapping), tracking codes and optional stock levels pulled from KeyCRM back into OpenCart.
author: CatCode
